name: @intentsolutionsio/api-schema-validator
description: Validate API schemas with JSON Schema, Joi, Yup, or Zod

scripts.postinstall: node -e "console.log(\"\\n→ This npm package is a tracking/proof artifact. Install the plugin via:\\n  ccpi install api-schema-validator\\n  or /plugin install api-schema-validator@claude-code-plugins-plus in Claude Code\\n\")"
